message:
perf(wasm): Strip debug symbols for 73% smaller binary, 2.6x faster cold start

Debug sections were 4MB of the 5.5MB WASM file. Adding strip=true removes them.

Before:
- edgebox-base.wasm: 5.5MB, cold start ~510ms

After:
- edgebox-base.wasm: 1.4MB, cold start ~199ms (with Wizer+AOT)

Changes:
- Add strip=true to wasm_exe and wasm_static_exe in build.zig
